payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and turned legs, visible lower shelf holding a woven basketlike object; wood finish looks scuffed/worn and the right side is edge-cropped in the image; appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
